scripts.cf:build: next build --webpack && node scripts/patch-opennext.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild
scripts.d1:migrate: wrangler d1 execute triphunt-media --file=./migrations/001_create_proposal_media.sql && wrangler d1 execute triphunt-media --file=./migrations/002_create_proposals.sql && wrangler d1 execute triphunt-media --file=./migrations/003_create_proposal_votes.sql
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute triphunt-media --local --file=./migrations/001_create_proposal_media.sql && wrangler d1 execute triphunt-media --local --file=./migrations/002_create_proposals.sql && wrangler d1 execute triphunt-media --local --file=./migrations/003_create_proposal_votes.sql
